options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show verbose output, useful for debugging

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --connect-api
options.description:
Specifies whether clients are being generated for the
N3O Connect API

options.name: --exclude-models-from
options.description:
Specify one or more URLs whose models should be
excluded (split using | )

options.name: --exclude-models
options.description:
Specify which models should be excluded (split using |
)

options.name: --include-models
options.description:
Specify which models should be included (split using |
)

options.name: --header
options.description:
Specifies one ore more headers to be sent with the HTTP
request when downloading the OpenAPI JSON (format is
name: value)

options.name: --language
options.description:
The language of the client, must be one of
typescript|csharp

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the client

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
The namespace of the client (when generating C#
clients)

options.name: --no-models
options.description: Specifies whether models should be generated or not

options.name: --output-path
options.description: The output path for the generated client

options.name: --package-description
options.description:
The npm package description (when generating TypeScript
clients)

options.name: --package-name
options.description:
The npm package name (when generating TypeScript
clients)

options.name: --path
options.description: The full path of the OpenAPI JSON file

options.name: --url
options.description: The full URL of the OpenAPI JSON file

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show verbose output, useful for debugging

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: prepack
commands.description:
Prepares .csproj files for packing by adding any transitive
NuGet references

options.name: --path
options.description:
The root folder for the project, if not specified defaults to
current folder

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show verbose output, useful for debugging

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: templates
commands.description:
Template related commands
Run 'n3o-tool [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show verbose output, useful for debugging

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: preview
commands.description:
Generate a preview of a template
Run 'templates [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --format
options.description: The format of the template, must be one of email|pdf|sms

options.name: --input-file
options.description: The path to the input file

options.name: --models-file
options.description: The path to a file containing any custom merge models

options.name: --output-file
options.description: The path to the output file

options.name: --subscription-id
options.description: The subscription ID of the template

options.name: --template-id
options.description: The ID of the template

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show verbose output, useful for debugging

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.
